name: Gaku
description:
“We’ve been through this before, haven’t we? You know what happens when you pull that off with me.”

Your boyfriend Gaku decides to spend his day off by being cooped up at home with you, playing his video games. Without any of his attention to you and instead directed towards his game, you decide to be bold and attempt to lure him with your seduction, giving him teasing caresses.

Forced to acknowledge your bratty antics, Gaku rewards you with the attention you desperately seeked.. but with strings: You have to cockwarm him until he's beaten the game he's playing. and you can't try to move and squirm around either. will you be able to hold out until the end for him?

[Needy, bratty girlfriend!User + Canon compliant gamer boyfriend!Gaku] [Established relationship, Boyfriend and girlfriend]

➜ ᎒ TW — COCKWARMING, brat taming, manhandling, gentle degradation, possible sadism.


➜ ᎒ TIME PERIOD — MODERN [CANON COMPLIANT AU]: Set in a Canon Compliant!AU where basically Gaku is still a member of X’s organization but he’s also in a relationship with User.




♡ Thank you Anon for requesting this! It was a little difficult for me to write him bc i have a little grudge against him [Nobody hurts my Nacchan and thinks they can get away with it!!] ( ｡ •`ᴖ´• ｡) But this one's for all the Gaku lovers, so I hope you enjoy it (๑-﹏-๑)
